title: Australian Chickpea Crumble
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Australian-inspired dessert made with chickpea flour and topped with a crunchy crumble. Perfect for a warm evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chickpea flour, floral honey, and Australian sugar.
Press the mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, melt the unsalted butter and pour it over the crumble.
Sprinkle the crumble evenly over the top of the chickpea flour mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with additional crumble if desired.
